stemHtml: An aircraft is approaching Alicante airport and wishes to carry out an RNAV approach to runway 28 via the initial approach fix, VILNA. The correct phraseology for the request is…

options.a: Globe Air 213, request RNAV approach via VILNA, runway 28.
options.b: Alicante approach, Globe air 213 request approach clearance to carry out an RNAV approach to runway 28.
options.c: Globe Air 213 request RNAV approach clearance to runway 28.
options.d: Alicante approach, Globe Air 213 we request an RNAV approach via the initial approach fix to runway 28.
